title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Itchy Ears
description: Calendula officinalis tinctures contains bioactive compounds like triterpenoids and carotenoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect itchy ears. The triterpenoids, particularly saponins, have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing in skin irritations. The carotenoids, especially lycopene and beta-carotene, have antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress. By red...
